<think> I know that Narendra Modi is the current Prime Minister of India. I also know that he is the leader of the Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP). The Socialist Janata Dal is a political party in India, and I recall that the BJP has an alliance with the Janata Dal (United) in the past, but I'm not sure if it's the same as the Socialist Janata Dal. However, I also know that the BJP has a strong alliance with the Janata Dal (United) in the state of Bihar. I'm going to take a guess that the alliance led by Narendra Modi is the National Democratic Alliance (NDA), which includes the BJP and its allies, including the Janata Dal (United).</think>
<answer> National Democratic Alliance (NDA) </answer>
